form.formComment: Could only manage eighth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when second (22.74) over 400m at this track. Nicely drawn on the inside and is worth plenty of thought.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on March 29 over 401m at Richmond behind Dashing For Gold beaten 3 lengths (22.98). Should be right in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by half a length at Richmond (29.93) beating Fantasia Shine in a Mix on March 18. Others preferred.

formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by half a length at Richmond (29.93) beating Fantasia Shine in a Mix on March 18. Others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels checked in the first turn.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (26.44) over 472m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (26.44) over 472m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome. Looks to have the job ahead.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together shortly after the start and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 6 length sixth (26.79) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at Richmond. Has ability but needs to find best and others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at the last two runs, both at Nowra, the latest when beaten 7 lengths behind Eidetic Memory over 365m. Prepared to just watch this time.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing second (23.41) at Richmond. Wide draw here. Deserves respect.

form.formComment: Unplaced in four tries at this track. Last start 4th over 340m at this track. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.
